title: Return of the Living Dead: Rave to the Grave
original_title: Return of the Living Dead: Rave to the Grave
overview: A student creates and sells a drug called 'Z' which has the unexpected side effect of resurrecting the dead as flesh-eating zombies, who proceed to wreak havoc at a Halloween rave.
